name: AtaiBeckley Inc.
business: AtaiBeckley is a clinical-stage biotechnology company developing psychedelic-based neuroplastogens for difficult-to-treat mental health conditions, including treatment-resistant depression (TRD), social anxiety disorder (SAD), and opioid use disorder (OUD). The company's pipeline includes BPL-003 (intranasal mebufotenin for TRD), VLS-01 (buccal DMT film for TRD), EMP-01 (oral R-MDMA for SAD), and a drug discovery program for novel 5-HT2A agonists.

exposures.sentence: We have built a diversified pipeline of investigational psychedelic-based neuroplastogens designed to address some of the most urgent unmet needs in mental health.
BPL-003 is a dry powder, intranasal formulation of the benzoate salt form of mebufotenin, a psychoactive indolealkylamine derivative of tryptamine.

VLS-01 is an investigational proprietary oral transmucosal film formulation of N,N-Dimethyltryptamine (DMT) applied to the buccal surface and is being developed for the treatment of people suffering from treatment-resistant depression (TRD).
EMP-01 is a novel, investigational, oral formulation of a stable HCl salt form of R-MDMA, the R-enantiomer of 3,4-methylenedioxymethamphetamine in development for Social Anxiety Disorder (SAD).
A drug discovery program to identify novel, non-hallucinogenic 5-HT2AR agonists for TRD and Opioid Use Disorder (OUD).

The production and sale of our product candidates may be considered illegal or may otherwise be restricted due to the use of controlled substances, which may also have consequences for the legality of investments from foreign jurisdictions and therefore we may not be successful in commercializing our product candidates in such jurisdictions, which will adversely affect our business, financial condition and results of operations.

catalysts.event: Initiation of Phase 3 program for BPL-003
catalysts.sentence: We remain on track to initiate the Phase 3 program in the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Initial data from Part 4 of Phase 2a study for BPL-003
catalysts.sentence: Initial data are expected in the fourth quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Topline data from Elumina Phase 2 study for VLS-01
catalysts.sentence: We anticipate reporting topline data for the Elumina study in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Phase 3 program initiation for BPL-003 (ReConnection 1 and 2)
catalysts.sentence: Initiation of the Phase 3 program is planned for the second quarter of 2026.

tamClaims.claim: Mental health disorders affect more than one billion people globally.
tamClaims.sentence: Mental health disorders are highly prevalent and estimated to affect more than one billion people globally.

tamClaims.claim: Global economic cost of mental health could reach $16.0 trillion by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: A Lancet Commission report estimates that the global economic cost will reach $16.0 trillion by 2030.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 65% of depression patients do not achieve remission after up to four antidepressant trials.
tamClaims.sentence: Approximately 65% of patients do not achieve remission of their symptoms after up to four antidepressant treatment trials, translating to a significant unmet medical need.

tamClaims.claim: 50% of the 300 million people with depression worldwide have treatment-resistant depression.
tamClaims.sentence: Of the estimated 300 million people who suffer from depression worldwide, 50% have depression which is treatment resistant.

tamClaims.claim: Social anxiety disorder affects an estimated 400-800 million individuals globally.
tamClaims.sentence: SAD is one of the most prevalent psychiatric conditions worldwide, affecting an estimated 400-800 million individuals with a lifetime prevalence of approximately 12%.
